case_title: MARIO CASTRO VS. CASE LEE MANALO et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTRO, MARIO
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTRO, MARIO AS TO DEFENDANT MANALO, CASE LEE DOES 1 TO 3 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MANALO, CASE LEE
DECLARATION OF DALY RENTAL VALUE $30.000 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTRO, MARIO
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTRO, MARIO
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTRO, MARIO SERVED AUG-01-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MANALO, CASE LEE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASTRO, MARIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MANALO, CASE LEE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1091 BUSH ST. #210, S.F. CA. 94109, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT MANALO, CASE LEE

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY WITH ACCRUED COST OF $85.00. AS TO DEFENDANT MANALO, CASE LEE
